svg.title: Day 2 ingestion workflow
svg.desc: Flowchart: setup phase feeds into three parallel embedding collections which converge to BM25 build, validation, and HuggingFace push
svg.text: embedding loop · per athlete · checkpoint every 50

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Image+Text embedding work for PDF pages?')
sendPrompt('How are coaching text chunks embedded?')
sendPrompt('How are NL week strings embedded for gym_tables?')
sendPrompt('How do we push embeddings to HuggingFace?')

svg.text: Option A · page search → dedup by athlete_id → return full PDF
all points carry athlete_id + pdf_path in payload
